user.title: RootLab
user.description: Add the RootLab garden planner to Home Assistant.

data.ai_task_entity: AI Task entity (for the "HA AI Task" provider)

data_description.ai_task_entity: Use any AI integration configured in HA (Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama…) — with account login handled by that integration.
data_description.api_key: API key of the selected provider. Verified against the provider on save; not needed for "HA AI Task" and Ollama.
data_description.imgw_station: IMGW measurement station for current temperature and rainfall (e.g. warszawa, krakow, gdansk).
data_description.weather_entity: A weather.* entity from your HA — source of hourly and daily forecasts (e.g. frost warnings).
data_description.ai_provider: AI service used for tasks, diagnoses and advice. "HA AI Task" uses an AI integration already configured in Home Assistant — no separate key.
data_description.ai_model: Which of the provider's models should answer. Empty = a known-good default (e.g. gemini-3.5-flash for Google). Once a valid key is saved, this becomes a dropdown of models fetched from your account — a custom name can still be typed.
data_description.ai_base_url: Only for Ollama (server address, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:11434/v1) or a custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Leave empty otherwise.
data_description.location: Garden coordinates — used for insolation calculations and climate context for the AI.

error.invalid_auth: Could not verify the key with the provider: {error_detail}

options.ha_ai_task: HA AI Task (any AI integration, account login)
